sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Singlamteh tung kikhai mi na muh ciangin,
Thakhatthu'n hin'na ngah ta un, ci.
Tua ahih ciang mawh neite'n en un zong un,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A kikhai mipa en-in hin'na ngah ta un.
Thakhatin hin'na pha ngah ta un.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna phel ding hi kei leh Amah inah,
Bang ding singlamteh thuak nuam ding hiam.
Mawhna pan sihna tawh hong tan nuam ding hiam,
A pang pan si bang ding a luang diam.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kisikna bek in mawhna kiphel zo lo,
A si bek in a hong phel zo hi.
A si a hong bua Topa Zeisu kiangah,
Na khialhna khempeuh hong puak in ci.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hong sapna lunghian' nading om lo ding hi.
Kicing zo hi, ci-in hong sam hi.
Lei a bei ciang khatvei hong pai lai ding a,
Thu ka hong khen ding hi, a ci hi.
